---
title: "Shilpa Gupta, Ph.D."
image: "shilpa.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:shilpa.gupta@sjsu,edu"
site: distill::distill_website
output: postcards::trestles
---
 
Engineers are problem solvers. I teach data science skills to engineers.
